card_description: Job is a historical figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Context: "Dick outlines a three-stage progression of the human experience with the Divine: 1) Suffering/Dread (The world is real and hostile), 2) Amazement/Pantheism (The world is alive and animate), and 3) Bliss/Acosmic Panentheism (The world is irreal, and man is isomorphic with God)."
